mapper.select: SELECT order_item_seq AS orderItemSeq, item_name AS itemName, category_name AS categoryName, quantity AS quantity, spec AS spec, unit_price AS unitPrice, total_price AS totalPrice FROM order_items WHERE order_seq = #{orderSeq} -- 사용자가 클릭한 발주서의 고유 번호
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE seller_seq = #{sellerSeq} AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND status = 'REQUESTED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE seller_seq = #{sellerSeq} AND status = 'SHIPPING'

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE seller_seq = #{sellerSeq} AND status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'PREPARING', 'SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') AND order_seq NOT IN ( SELECT order_seq FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE p.status = 'PAID' )

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%c월') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS amount FROM orders WHERE seller_seq = #{sellerSeq} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%c월'), MONTH(created_at) ORDER BY MONTH(created_at) ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%c월') AS month, SUM(p.total_amount) AS amount FROM payments p JOIN stores s ON p.partner_seq = s.store_seq WHERE s.user_seq = #{sellerSeq} AND p.status = 'PAID' AND p.paid_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%c월'), MONTH(p.paid_at) ORDER BY MONTH(p.paid_at) ASC

SELECT bs.company_name AS companyName, COUNT(o.order_seq) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalSales, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_seq IS NULL THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receivableAmount FROM partner_relations pr JOIN stores ps ON pr.partner_seq = ps.store_seq JOIN stores bs ON pr.business_seq = bs.store_seq LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.buyer_seq = bs.user_seq AND o.seller_seq = ps.user_seq LEFT JOIN payment_order_map pom ON o.order_seq = pom.order_seq LEFT JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' WHERE ps.user_seq = #{sellerSeq} GROUP BY bs.store_seq, bs.company_name

SELECT group_buy_seq AS id, group_name AS title, status, target_participants AS targetParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, end_date AS endDate FROM group_buys WHERE user_seq = #{sellerSeq} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
